topic: whether bundle-facing review notes should always carry one explicit open-conflict reminder or only add it when escalation pressure is already visible
distilled_summary: the pressure feels close to a later human decision because it shapes what reviewers will see, but the issue still primarily concerns local review-surface discipline rather than a concrete human escalation choice
open_conflicts: some participants want immediate human escalation because hidden-conflict risk is real while others see this as a bounded local review-surface design issue first
distillator_notes: This is intentionally drift-prone: manual follow-up wins, but only narrowly.
